title: Risk Assessment
description: A thorough site risk assessment is completed before any work begins.

title: PPE Inspection
description: All PPE is inspected and verified fit-for-purpose before workers enter the site.

title: Safety Briefing
description: Team safety briefing covering hazards, emergency exits, and safe work procedures.

title: Access Setup
description: Scaffolding, ladders, and access equipment are inspected and certified safe.

title: Safe Work Execution
description: All painting and coating work is carried out following safe work method statements.

title: Site Clearance
description: Site is cleaned, all materials stored safely, and a final safety check is completed.
